positive: A highly stylized, symmetrical illustration featuring geometric woodland fauna and celestial elements. The main subject is a large, stylized fox silhouette intertwined with intricate constellations, glowing bioluminescent mushrooms, and winding geometric vines. Use a deep sapphire blue and emerald green color palette accented with touches of stark gold line-work. The composition must be central and highly balanced, suitable for a circular apparel print. Style must be a blend of intricate tattoo art and minimalist scientific illustration, achieving a sharp, high-contrast, graphic novel quality. Ensure clean edges, thick outlines, and a sense of depth through layered silhouettes. Vector-art aesthetic, perfect for screen printing, isolated on a clean background.
negative: low quality, amateur, blur, grainy, watermark, signature, text, writing, dirty, messy, bad anatomy, extra limbs, cartoon, photo-realistic, excessive detail, oversaturated, ugly
